intro.text: A PMP®-certified Project Coordinator based in Beirut, Iman leads multi-region projects from planning through delivery — pairing strong coordination and risk management with hands-on data analytics and a growing portfolio of web projects.

actress.title: Project Management
actress.body: From work breakdown structures to budgeting, resource allocation, and risk assessment, Iman plans, monitors, and delivers projects on time. At Areeba Fintech she coordinated IT Infrastructure projects across regions — aligning stakeholders, defining timelines and milestones, and reporting on progress.

entrepreneur.title: Data Analytics
entrepreneur.body: Iman turns raw data into clear decisions — building interactive dashboards, cleaning and modeling data, and connecting external sources. At UNRWA she created Activity Info forms and Power BI dashboards, shaping and transforming data through Power Query.

philanthropist.title: Web Projects
philanthropist.body: Beyond coordination and data, Iman designs and builds websites and web applications — from a complete exam-management platform to polished business sites for local brands. Explore a few live projects →

quote.text: Plan with precision, deliver with clarity, and let the data lead.

contact.heading: Let’s work together
contact.sub: For project coordination, data analytics, or a new website — reach out and let’s talk. Based in Beirut, Lebanon.
